# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    environment:
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=elasticsearch
      - discovery.type=single-node
    volumes:
      - ./data/es:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - 9200:9200

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOST=elasticsearch
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PORT=9200
    volumes:
      - ./data/ls:/tmp/logstash/
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOST=elasticsearch
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PORT=9200
    ports:
      - 5601:5601
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm-agent-java/apm-server:7.10.2
    environment:
      - XPACK_MONITORING_ENABLED=true
      - XPACK_APM_ENABLED=true
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOST=elasticsearch
      - ELASTICSEARCH_PORT=9200
    volumes:
      - ./data/apm:/usr/share/apm-server/data/
    ports:
      - 8200:8200

networks:
  default:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  data-es:
    name: data-es
  data-ls:
    name: data-ls
  data-apm:
    name: data-apm
